_meta.description: Canonical long-format baseline table. GENERATED by scripts/build_baseline_rates.py from data/raw/*.json — do not edit by hand; edit the raw files and regenerate.
_meta.phase_transition_notes: BIO/QLS uses four transitions (phase1_to_2, phase2_to_3, phase3_to_filing, filing_to_approval), phase-by-phase. Wong uses three (phase1_to_2, phase2_to_3, phase3_to_approval — the last merges filing+approval), path-by-path, plus 'loa' (overall Phase 1 -> Approval). Wong and BIO/QLS rows are NOT interchangeable at phase3; the engine's default fallback uses only BIO/QLS phase-by-phase rows.
